source_pr.title: variable, main: make sure default values for sysvars validate
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:

Fixes https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/24794 

This adds a new test to the variable package, and fixes a few inconsistencies.

If you try and set a sysvar to its default value, it should both pass validation and the value should already be normalized.

This is incredibly useful, because the most annoying thing is trying to set a setting to something like what it already is, but it fails validation.

This also increases the code-coverage for variable:
```
From:
ok  	github.com/pingcap/tidb/sessionctx/variable	0.012s	coverage: 48.7% of statements
To:
ok  	github.com/pingcap/tidb/sessionctx/variable	0.014s	coverage: 52.7% of statements
```

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

Added test and inconsistencies fixed.

### Related changes

- None

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- None

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: + // Because JSON key order is non-deterministic, this test is flaky.
failure_signature: + // Because JSON key order is non-deterministic, this test is flaky.
root_cause_explanation: The test mutated global configuration (`CheckMb4ValueInUTF8`) without restoring it and also needed to run in a serial suite, causing order-dependent failures across the suite. The fix restores the original global value and moves the test (`TestPostSettings`) into `HTTPHandlerTestSerialSuite` to avoid cross-test interference.
fix_pattern: Restore mutated global config (`CheckMb4ValueInUTF8`) after the test and run `TestPostSettings` in `HTTPHandlerTestSerialSuite` (serial suite).

evidence: evidence: + // Because JSON key order is non-deterministic, this test is flaky.
files: server/http_handler_test.go, sessionctx/variable/noop.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar_test.go, tidb-server/main.go, tidb-server/main_test.go
